chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 2170 of 2024 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For orders on CMA No.371/2026 27.01.2026 Petitioner Nasir Jawed is present in person though his Counsel Mr. Muhammad Aakif Shaikh was also present in the earlier part of the day. Mr. Asad Ahmed, Advocate for KMA a/w Athar Rasheed, Deputy Director Accommodation on behalf of Tehseen-ur-Rehman, Director Accommodation, the alleged contemnor No.2. PI Nadeem Haider, SHO of PS Artillery Maidan, Karachi South. ------------------------------------ Pursuant to the directions issued in the earlier part of the day, SHO Inspector Nadeem Haider of PS Artillery Maidan present and files his report, which is taken on record. He submits that the quarter in question i.e. Quarter No.3 has been got vacated from the occupant and the petitioner has affixed his own locks on the said quarter. The petitioner satisfied with the above, however, submits that the alleged contemnors as well as the SHO concerned may be directed to ensure safety of the locks unless he may shift his family in the said quarter, which is also undertaken by Athar Rasheed, Deputy Director Accommodation as well as the SHO present. The petitioner also submits that since the rent in respect of the said quarter, which was occupied by some other employee had been deducted from his salary right from 02.11.2015, hence the respondents particularly the Director Pay Roll may be directed to refund the amount, which has been deducted from the salary of the petitioner on account of the rent.

The petitioner satisfied with the above, however, submits that the alleged contemnors as well as the SHO concerned may be directed to ensure safety of the locks unless he may shift his family in the said quarter, which is also undertaken by Athar Rasheed, Deputy Director Accommodation as well as the SHO present. The petitioner also submits that since the rent in respect of the said quarter, which was occupied by some other employee had been deducted from his salary right from 02.11.2015, hence the respondents particularly the Director Pay Roll may be directed to refund the amount, which has been deducted from the salary of the petitioner on account of the rent. The Deputy Director Accommodation submits that the petitioner may be directed to approach the Director Pay Roll along with his application to do the needful. Order accordingly. In view of the above, the listed application is hereby disposed of, however, the alleged contemnors as well as the SHO shall provide the legal protection to the petitioner and his family unless they may shift themselves in the quarter in question. The respondents particularly the alleged contemnors shall not cause any kind of harassment or loss to the petitioner and / or his family as well as the service only because of the filing of this petition. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
